coverage_criteria: Describes the sequential steps taken to complete this task from start to finish.

description: Object: what is being worked on
coverage_criteria: Names the specific artifact, document, system, or entity that is the primary target of this task.
Distinguishes between the inputs consumed and the outputs produced by this task.

description: Outcome: how task completion is determined
coverage_criteria: States the explicit signal or criterion used to decide the task is done (e.g., approval received, metric threshold met, file submitted).

description: Experience requirements: skills, expertise, and personal differentiation in this task
coverage_criteria: Names the core technical or domain skills required to perform this task competently.
Identifies any training, certifications, or prior experience that are prerequisites or that significantly accelerate learning.
Describes tacit knowledge or judgment calls that are hard to learn from documentation alone.
Captures what the person believes they do differently or better than others performing the same task.

description: Tools: tools and methods used for this task
coverage_criteria: Lists each specific tool, software, or method used at each step of the task.
